subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — it was great connecting at the conference, and we'd be glad to explore a partnership further.

Here are a few proposed meeting slots:

- April 21, 2026, 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026, 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which time works best, and we'll get it on the calendar.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we're unable to share internal contact information. For details about our leadership team, please refer to our public website.

Looking forward to the discussion!

Best regards
